title: rubus × tephrodes
intro: Rubus × tephrodes, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the Himalayan raspberry (Rubus ellipticus). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of anthocyanins and ellagic acid. The health benefits of Rubus × tephrodes include its potential to reduce the risk of certain cancers, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Rubus × tephrodes can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or supplement, and is also used in jams and other food products.
